zh.lifeSummary: 當Helena de Montfort於1372年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯塔福德時，她的父親Sir William de Montfort-3歲，母親Rose Brandeston12歲。她和Sir Richard Merbrooke Baron至少有1個女兒。她去世於1463年1月24日在她的家鄉享年91歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Helena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , used also in Germany, the Netherlands, Scandinavia, and Eastern Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Helena de Montfort was born in 1372, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William de Montfort, was -3 and her mother, Rose Brandeston, was 12. She had at least 1 daughter with Sir Richard Merbrooke Baron. She died on 24 January 1463, in her hometown, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helena de Montfort est née en 1372, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William de Montfort, avait -3 ans et sa mère, Rose Brandeston, avait 12 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Sir Richard Merbrooke Baron. Elle est décédée le 24 janvier 1463, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helena de Montfort 1372 in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Montfort -3 und ihre Mutter Rose Brandeston 12. Sie hatte mit Sir Richard Merbrooke Baron mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 24. Januar 1463 im Alter von 91 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

ko.lifeSummary: Helena de Montfort(이)가 1372년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Montfort(은)는 -3세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rose Brandeston(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 Sir Richard Merbrooke Baron(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1463년 1월 24일 그녀의 고향에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helena de Montfort родилась в 1372 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William de Montfort было -3 год, а матери, которую звали Rose Brandeston, 12. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Sir Richard Merbrooke Baron. Она умерла 24 января 1463 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 91 год.
